plugins.name: academic-research-skills
plugins.description: 8 AI skills covering literature review, experiment design, statistical analysis, simulation, lab notebook, paper writing, peer review, and pipeline orchestration. Merges upstream v3.4–v3.7.3 (PRISMA-trAIce compliance, sprint contract, generator-evaluator gates, literature corpus adapters, claim faithfulness) on top of fork's experiment pipeline (PaperOrchestra + Lu 2026). Optional PaperBanana and Google Colab MCP integrations.
